meta.purpose: Structured SEO topic database for industrial IoT solution pages, content planning, internal linking, and future page generation.

field_definitions.title: Human-readable page or topic title.
field_definitions.priority: SEO/business priority: P1, P2, or P3.
field_definitions.target_products: Products to feature and internally link.
field_definitions.protocols: Protocols and communication technologies to mention.

topics.title: Energy Monitoring
topics.notes: Core solution page for energy meters, power data acquisition, dashboards, alerts, and reporting.

topics.title: Factory Energy Monitoring
topics.notes: Focus on plant energy visibility, machine-level metering, peak demand, ISO 50001, and cost reduction.

topics.title: Building Energy Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover sub-metering, tenant energy billing, HVAC energy use, and facility dashboards.

topics.title: Power Meter Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong fit for Modbus-to-MQTT gateway keywords and meter data acquisition.

topics.title: Power Quality Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover voltage, current, harmonics, power factor, alarms, and reporting.

topics.title: Peak Demand Monitoring
topics.notes: Position around demand charge reduction and threshold alerts.

topics.title: Transformer Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover temperature, load, oil level, alarms, and remote substations.

topics.title: Distribution Cabinet Monitoring
topics.notes: Focus on cabinet temperature, door status, breaker state, and power meter data.

topics.title: Generator Monitoring
topics.notes: High-value remote monitoring page for gensets, fuel, battery, alarms, runtime, and maintenance.

topics.title: UPS Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover battery status, load, alarms, runtime, and data center or telecom use cases.

topics.title: Battery Energy Storage Monitoring
topics.notes: Use for BESS, battery cabinets, PCS/BMS integration, alarms, and renewable hybrid systems.

topics.title: Microgrid Monitoring
topics.notes: Good for hybrid solar, storage, generator, and load monitoring architecture content.

topics.title: Substation Remote Monitoring
topics.notes: Position around unmanned substations, alarms, transformer monitoring, and remote telemetry.

topics.title: Water Monitoring
topics.notes: Category-level page for water utilities, tanks, pumps, pressure, flow, and quality sensors.

topics.title: Pump Station Monitoring
topics.notes: One of the highest-value RTU solution pages. Include pumps, level, pressure, flow, alarms, and remote control.

topics.title: Lift Station Monitoring
topics.notes: Similar to pump station monitoring but focused on wastewater lift stations, overflow alarms, and pump runtime.

topics.title: Tank Level Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong cross-industry page for water tanks, oil tanks, reservoirs, silos, and chemical tanks.

topics.title: Reservoir Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover water level, rainfall, weather station, remote telemetry, and flood risk.

topics.title: Water Quality Monitoring
topics.notes: Include pH, turbidity, dissolved oxygen, conductivity, chlorine, and remote alerts.

topics.title: Flow Meter Monitoring
topics.notes: Good long-tail gateway for pulse/RS485 flow meter data acquisition.

topics.title: Pressure Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover pipe pressure, pump pressure, leakage indication, and threshold alarms.

topics.title: Pipeline Leakage Monitoring
topics.notes: Use pressure/flow anomaly and remote monitoring architecture.

topics.title: Wastewater Treatment Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover pumps, blowers, pH, DO, level, flow, alarms, and SCADA/cloud integration.

topics.title: Sewage Pump Monitoring
topics.notes: Specific page for pump status, overflow, runtime, and remote alarm notification.

topics.title: Irrigation Canal Monitoring
topics.notes: Good bridge between water and agriculture monitoring.

topics.title: Smart Water Metering
topics.notes: Cover district metering, water consumption, remote reading, and leakage detection.

topics.title: RO Water System Monitoring
topics.notes: Niche page for industrial RO pressure, flow, conductivity, pump and filter status.

topics.title: Hospital Water System Monitoring
topics.notes: Niche but useful for facility monitoring, water quality, pumps, and alarms.

topics.title: Solar Monitoring
topics.notes: Category page for solar inverter, weather station, string, and PV plant monitoring.

topics.title: Solar Inverter Monitoring
topics.notes: High-priority commercial page for Modbus inverter data to cloud.

topics.title: PV Plant Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover plant-level architecture, inverter arrays, combiner boxes, weather station, and dashboards.

topics.title: Rooftop Solar Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for commercial rooftop solar and distributed solar assets.

topics.title: Solar String Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover string current, combiner boxes, fault detection, and PV performance.

topics.title: Solar Weather Station Monitoring
topics.notes: Use for irradiance, temperature, wind, and PR calculation.

topics.title: Wind Turbine Monitoring
topics.notes: Include turbine status, alarms, wind data, generator data, and remote sites.

topics.title: Wind Farm Monitoring
topics.notes: Broader wind site page, useful after turbine monitoring page.

topics.title: Battery Storage Monitoring
topics.notes: Potential duplicate intent with BESS monitoring; keep for renewable category and interlink.

topics.title: Hybrid Energy Monitoring
topics.notes: Solar + battery + generator + load monitoring.

topics.title: Remote Renewable Energy Site Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for remote solar farms, wind sites, battery sites, and off-grid energy.

topics.title: Factory Monitoring
topics.notes: Core manufacturing page connecting equipment, PLC, energy, alarms, and dashboard.

topics.title: Machine Monitoring
topics.notes: Core page for machine data, runtime, alarms, counters, and remote diagnostics.

topics.title: Production Line Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover line status, throughput, downtime, OEE, and dashboards.

topics.title: Equipment Runtime Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong long-tail page for runtime, status, stop/start, and utilization monitoring.

topics.title: OEE Data Collection
topics.notes: Include availability, performance, quality, data capture methods, and line examples.

topics.title: Predictive Maintenance Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover vibration, temperature, current, runtime, alarms, and predictive maintenance workflow.

topics.title: Motor Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover current, vibration, temperature, overload, runtime, and motor failure prevention.

topics.title: Compressor Monitoring
topics.notes: High practical value for air compressors, pressure, runtime, power, and maintenance alerts.

topics.title: Boiler Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover temperature, pressure, water level, fuel, alarms, and boiler room monitoring.

topics.title: Chiller Monitoring
topics.notes: Can be shared between factory and building/facility clusters.

topics.title: HVAC Equipment Monitoring
topics.notes: Consider consolidating with HVAC Monitoring or linking as a factory-specific variant.

topics.title: CNC Machine Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover status, alarms, runtime, production counts, and remote diagnostics.

topics.title: Injection Molding Machine Monitoring
topics.notes: Specific machine-builder/OEM opportunity.

topics.title: Packaging Line Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover counts, downtime, speed, reject rate, and OEE.

topics.title: Conveyor Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for runtime, jam detection, motor status, and alarms.

topics.title: Industrial Alarm Monitoring
topics.notes: Cross-industry page for alarms from dry contacts, relay outputs, PLCs, and sensors.

topics.title: Factory Environmental Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover temperature, humidity, dust, gas, noise, and industrial park compliance.

topics.title: Smart Agriculture
topics.notes: Category page for greenhouse, irrigation, weather, livestock, aquaculture, and farm monitoring.

topics.title: Greenhouse Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover temperature, humidity, CO2, light, soil moisture, irrigation, and ventilation control.

topics.title: Soil Moisture Monitoring
topics.notes: Good long-tail solution page for precision irrigation and soil sensor networks.

topics.title: Smart Irrigation Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover soil moisture, flow, pressure, pump, valve, and automated irrigation scheduling.

topics.title: Weather Station Monitoring
topics.notes: Cross-link with solar weather station and environmental monitoring.

topics.title: Farm Water Pump Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful bridge topic between agriculture and pump station monitoring.

topics.title: Livestock Farm Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover temperature, humidity, ammonia, ventilation, water, and feed equipment monitoring.

topics.title: Poultry Farm Monitoring
topics.notes: Subtopic for poultry house environment, ventilation, water, and alarms.

topics.title: Aquaculture Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover dissolved oxygen, pH, temperature, pumps, aerators, and alarms.

topics.title: Grain Storage Monitoring
topics.notes: Cross-link with grain silo and warehouse temperature monitoring.

topics.title: Cold Chain Agriculture Monitoring
topics.notes: Niche page for post-harvest storage and logistics temperature visibility.

topics.title: Fertigation System Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful niche content around dosing pumps, EC/pH, flow, and irrigation control.

topics.title: Environmental Monitoring
topics.notes: Category page for air, dust, noise, gas, flood, river, and industrial park monitoring.

topics.title: Air Quality Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover PM2.5, PM10, CO2, VOC, temperature, humidity, and remote dashboards.

topics.title: Dust Monitoring
topics.notes: Good page for construction sites, industrial parks, and factories.

topics.title: Noise Monitoring
topics.notes: Cover boundary noise, construction sites, industrial zones, and alerts.

topics.title: Weather Monitoring
topics.notes: Keep distinct from agriculture weather station; use environmental/weather station context.

topics.title: Flood Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong priority for rivers, canals, underpasses, rainfall, level, and alerting.

topics.title: River Level Monitoring
topics.notes: Long-tail solution for water level telemetry and flood early warning.

topics.title: Soil Monitoring
topics.notes: Can cross-link heavily with soil moisture and smart agriculture.

topics.title: Groundwater Monitoring
topics.notes: Niche but useful for wells, groundwater level, and environmental compliance.

topics.title: Gas Detection Monitoring
topics.notes: High-value safety and environmental page; include combustible/toxic gas and alarms.

topics.title: Hazardous Area Monitoring
topics.notes: Use carefully; avoid overclaiming certifications unless hardware supports them.

topics.title: Emission Monitoring
topics.notes: Good for industrial parks, factories, and environmental compliance.

topics.title: Industrial Park Environmental Monitoring
topics.notes: Cluster page combining air, dust, noise, gas, weather, and dashboard reporting.

topics.title: Construction Site Environmental Monitoring
topics.notes: Include dust, noise, weather, video optional only if product supports it.

topics.title: Oil & Gas Monitoring
topics.notes: Pillar page for remote oilfield, pipeline, tank, valve, and station monitoring.

topics.title: Pipeline Monitoring
topics.notes: Good commercial page for pressure, flow, leakage, valve status, and alarms.

topics.title: Wellhead Monitoring
topics.notes: Use for pressure, temperature, flow, pump status, and remote alarms.

topics.title: Oil Tank Monitoring
topics.notes: Also maps to fuel tank and chemical tank monitoring keyword clusters.

topics.title: Gas Pressure Monitoring
topics.notes: Specific long-tail topic for gas distribution and station monitoring.

topics.title: Gas Flow Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for meter reading, flow totalizing, and cloud reporting.

topics.title: Cathodic Protection Monitoring
topics.notes: Niche but high-intent topic for pipeline corrosion monitoring.

topics.title: Remote Valve Monitoring
topics.notes: Applicable to valve position, actuator control, and alarm workflows.

topics.title: Pumpjack Monitoring
topics.notes: Industrial long-tail topic for oilfield equipment remote monitoring.

topics.title: Fuel Tank Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong fit for generators, telecom sites, depots, and remote facilities.

topics.title: LPG Station Monitoring
topics.notes: Include pressure, level, gas detection, emergency alarms, and remote reporting.

topics.title: Compressor Station Monitoring
topics.notes: Bridge oil and gas with general compressor monitoring product intent.

topics.title: Smart City Monitoring
topics.notes: Pillar page for street lights, flood, cabinets, manholes, and public utilities.

topics.title: Street Light Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for switching, dimming, fault detection, and cabinet monitoring.

topics.title: Smart Pole Monitoring
topics.notes: Can combine lighting, environment, power, and cabinet telemetry.

topics.title: Manhole Monitoring
topics.notes: Include cover status, water level, gas, and intrusion alarms.

topics.title: Bridge Monitoring
topics.notes: Use if content can stay focused on data acquisition and remote telemetry.

topics.title: Tunnel Monitoring
topics.notes: Position around ventilation, gas, water level, power, and alarm monitoring.

topics.title: Roadside Cabinet Monitoring
topics.notes: Good overlap with telecom cabinet and public infrastructure monitoring.

topics.title: Traffic Signal Monitoring
topics.notes: Lower priority unless product portfolio supports traffic cabinet integrations.

topics.title: Parking Lot Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful secondary page if parking sensors or gateways are part of partner ecosystem.

topics.title: Public Utility Monitoring
topics.notes: Broad commercial term for city water, power, lighting, and environmental telemetry.

topics.title: Urban Flood Monitoring
topics.notes: Important overlap with river level, drainage, rainfall, and pump station pages.

topics.title: Building Automation Monitoring
topics.notes: Use cautiously with BACnet if not supported directly; can mention via protocol converter only when true.

topics.title: HVAC Monitoring
topics.notes: High-value bridge between building, factory, chiller, boiler, and energy content.

topics.title: Chiller Plant Monitoring
topics.notes: Good commercial topic for energy optimization and equipment data collection.

topics.title: Boiler Room Monitoring
topics.notes: Include temperature, pressure, water level, gas detection, and alarm transmission.

topics.title: Smart Building Energy Monitoring
topics.notes: Important keyword cluster for commercial buildings and facilities.

topics.title: Elevator Monitoring
topics.notes: Lower priority unless there are real elevator integration examples.

topics.title: Fire Pump Monitoring
topics.notes: Good facility safety monitoring topic; avoid implying certified fire-control functions.

topics.title: Data Center Environmental Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong page for temperature, humidity, water leak, door, and alarm collection.

topics.title: Data Center Power Monitoring
topics.notes: Pair with UPS, PDU, generator, and battery backup monitoring pages.

topics.title: Commercial Facility Monitoring
topics.notes: Broad cluster page for malls, offices, campuses, and public buildings.

topics.title: Hospital Facility Monitoring
topics.notes: Position as facility monitoring only; avoid medical device claims.

topics.title: Campus Energy Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for schools, universities, hospitals, and industrial parks.

topics.title: Telecom Tower Monitoring
topics.notes: Pillar page for power, cabinet, temperature, fuel, battery, and security monitoring.

topics.title: Base Station Monitoring
topics.notes: Very relevant for emerging markets and remote infrastructure.

topics.title: Remote Shelter Monitoring
topics.notes: Fits telecom shelters, utility rooms, and unmanned cabins.

topics.title: Telecom Power Monitoring
topics.notes: High-value page for rectifier, UPS, battery, generator, and power meter data.

topics.title: Battery Backup Monitoring
topics.notes: Reuse across telecom, solar, UPS, and remote sites.

topics.title: Generator Fuel Monitoring
topics.notes: Strong commercial topic for theft prevention, refill planning, and uptime.

topics.title: Cabinet Temperature Monitoring
topics.notes: Long-tail page that can link to data center and roadside cabinet monitoring.

topics.title: Remote Site Security Monitoring
topics.notes: Keep scope to digital alarms, door status, cabinet intrusion, and telemetry.

topics.title: Cold Storage Monitoring
topics.notes: Pillar page for warehouse, freezer, food, pharma, and logistics temperature monitoring.

topics.title: Warehouse Temperature Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for multi-point wireless monitoring and cloud dashboards.

topics.title: Refrigerator Monitoring
topics.notes: Potential fit for pharmacies, labs, kitchens, and distributed refrigerators.

topics.title: Freezer Monitoring
topics.notes: Long-tail topic for low-temperature alarms and historical records.

topics.title: Food Storage Monitoring
topics.notes: Use for food warehouses, processing plants, restaurants, and distribution centers.

topics.title: Pharmaceutical Storage Monitoring
topics.notes: High-value page; avoid compliance claims unless documented by product/process.

topics.title: Grain Silo Monitoring
topics.notes: Links naturally with grain storage and agriculture monitoring pages.

topics.title: Logistics Temperature Monitoring
topics.notes: Position for warehouses and fixed logistics nodes unless vehicle tracking is supported.

topics.title: OEM Remote Monitoring
topics.notes: Important B2B commercial page for machine builders exporting connected equipment.

topics.title: Machine Builder IoT Gateway
topics.notes: A product-solution hybrid page for OEM purchase intent.

topics.title: White Label IoT Gateway Solution
topics.notes: Only publish if white-label/custom branding is a real offer.

topics.title: Remote Diagnostics for OEM Equipment
topics.notes: High-value content for after-sales service, alarms, telemetry, and troubleshooting.

topics.title: After-sales Equipment Monitoring
topics.notes: Useful for OEMs wanting service visibility after equipment delivery.

topics.title: Predictive Maintenance for OEM Machines
topics.notes: Use as aspirational but keep claims tied to data collection and integration.

topics.title: Equipment Rental Monitoring
topics.notes: Good for runtime, location-adjacent telemetry, usage, fuel, and maintenance alerts.

topics.title: Fleet Machine Monitoring
topics.notes: Clarify whether CAN/GPS are supported before turning this into a product claim.
